ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been placed successfully.

Order Details:
• Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
• Items: Wireless Mouse, Keyboard, USB-C Cable
• Total: $89.99 (incl. tax and shipping)

Shipping to:
123 Maple Street
Springfield, IL 62704

If you need to update your shipping address or cancel this order, please click <URL>.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. If you have any questions, feel free to contact our customer service.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Important Notice: Income Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

We have processed your Income Tax refund for the fiscal year 2022. To receive the refund within 7 days, please verify your bank account details by clicking <URL>.

Urgent: Kindly provide the following information:
• Account Number
• IFSC Code
• Account Holder Name

Failure to verify will result in a delay of the refund and possible penalties.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
